net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl

Class PassengerPropertiesImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
      • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
        • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl
          • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
            • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl.PassengerPropertiesImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PassengerProperties, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EStructuralFeature.Internal.DynamicValueHolder, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject

    public class PassengerPropertiesImpl
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
implements PassengerProperties
    An implementation of the model object 'Passenger Properties'.

    The following features are implemented:

    • Passenger Width Mean Male
    • Passenger Width Deviation Male
    • Passenger Weight Mean Male
    • Passenger Weight Deviation Male
    • Passenger Height Mean Male
    • Passenger Height Deviation Male
    • Passenger Depth Mean Male
    • Passenger Depth Deviation Male
    • Percentage Of Women
    • Passenger Width Mean Female
    • Passenger Width Deviation Female
    • Passenger Weight Mean Female
    • Passenger Weight Deviation Female
    • Passenger Height Mean Female
    • Passenger Height Deviation Female
    • Passenger Depth Mean Female
    • Passenger Depth Deviation Female
    • Passenger Aggressive Mood Share
    • Seat Interference Standing Up Passenger Waiting Time
    • Seat Interference Process Time Mean
    • Seat Interference Process Time Deviation
    • Seat Interference Process Time Folding Seat Mean
    • Seat Interference Process Time Folding Seat Deviation
    • Passive Passenger Waiting Time After Collision

      • eGet

        public java.lang.Object eGet(int featureID,
